prestazioni: Engine: VR30DDTT (3.0L twin-turbo V6) – Full bolt-on turbo upgrade with Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbos (62mm compressor, 82mm turbine) paired with custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipes (CPE Performance) and a Tomei 3-inch titanium exhaust system with 110mm dual outlets. Requires VR30DDTT-specific fueling upgrades including Injector Dynamics ID1050x injectors and a Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup to manage increased blow-by under boost.

Drivetrain: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (Q50-specific 7.3:1 final drive ratio) with upgraded VR30DDTT-specific axles (Driveshaft Shop 3.5-inch chromoly) and a Z1 Motorsports lightweight aluminum flywheel (12.5lb) to reduce rotational mass. Pair with a South Bend Clutch Stage 3 daily-spec disc for improved torque capacity (650 ft-lb).

Suspension & Handling: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (Q50-specific valving) with Eibach ERS 1000N/mm helper springs for reduced nose dive under braking. Front: Cusco 29mm adjustable sway bar (3-way settings); Rear: Cusco 22mm adjustable sway bar. Complete poly bushings (SuperPro 62mm front control arm bushings, rear subframe bushings) and Hardrace VR30DDTT-specific camber plates for -3.5° front camber.
estetica: Aero: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (Q50 4-door specific) with carbon fiber front splitter (35mm overhang), rear diffuser (120mm extension), and GT-style side skirts. Pair with a Seibon carbon fiber hood (VR30DDTT-specific NACA ducts) and a custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap with satin clear coat for heat dissipation.

Wheels: Work Emotion CR Kiwami (19x9.5 +22 front, 19x11 +30 rear) in Hyper Silver with Yokohama Advan Sport A/S+ tires (255/35/19 front, 295/30/19 rear). Hardware: Project Kics R40 12x1.5 lug nuts (extended thread) and DBA 5000 Series two-piece rotors (Q50-specific 356mm front, 330mm rear) with Ferodo DS2500 pads.

Interior: Recaro Sportster CS (Q50-specific mounting brackets) with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses (4-way adjust). Steering wheel: NRG Innovations 350mm suede wheel with quick-release hub (VR30DDTT-specific clock spring bypass). Gauges: AEM X-Series 30-0300 wideband AFR gauge and Defi BF II boost gauge (52mm, red LED) mounted in a custom carbon fiber A-pillar pod.
